title: Command Keybind Changer
description: Dont want to open your keybinds and instead run a command? Perfect!
body:
### How to Install:

1. Download the mod.
2. Place it in your `mods` folder.
3. Launch the game.
4. Run `/change-keybind` <Keybind> <Goal key>
5. Enjoy!

### You might be interested in this mod:
[Keybind Sets](https://modrinth.com/mod/keybind-sets)


### What the Mod Does:

* Allows you to change any keybind via chat!
* Keys will instantly be saved and activated!
* All normal keys are supported. (Some languages / keyboards might not be supported)

### MAIN USAGE:
* Make Keybind sets via command macro's (For pvp gamemodes, such as Crystal, Mace, etc)


### Dependencies:
* [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
